Subject: My "thank you"

Hi <firstname>

A few days ago, I sent an email about my "thank you" plan.

Unfortunately, there were problems getting that email
delivered to the majority of my readers.

I guess we have all heard about "the best laid plans."

In any case, I wanted to follow up in case you hadn't gotten
that email... because the timing on this is drawing tight. I
have a deadline of this coming Thursday. There is a reason
for that:

You see, Abbie's wedding is Saturday... obviously, I am
going to have a lot on my mind. So I just can't afford any
extra distractions after Thursday. And that is why this
Special Offer goes away at midnight eastern time on Thursday
October 6th.

So exactly WHAT special offer am I talking about? 

Well, as a "thank you" gift to my readers, I have put
together a huge bundle of just about everything I have ever
done that puts more love, romance, and passion into your
life. And then I completely slashed the price for you - by
more than half.

This really is the "Mother Of All Offers" from the Mother
Of The Bride. 

You can read more about it here:

http://www.goromance.com/MotherOfAllOffers.html


One other thing... there are some special bonuses for the
first 50 people who take advantage of this offer - those
bonuses are going quickly... I can't guarantee how long they
will last. So it is best if you go take a look right now.


warmly,
Leslie

P.S.> I have NEVER done anything like this before... and I
don't have any plans to repeat it. This bundle is perfect
whether you are IN a relationship, or just open to finding
one. Go take a look:

http://www.goromance.com/MotherOfAllOffers.html
